Oke, gue udah tangkap konteksnya. Lanjut!
APK v2.0 udah di `/sdcard/YouTube-Player.apk`. Install, coba, kasih tau ada error apa gak. 🔥
sudah jadi tapi masih berbentuk webview bro

# 🔥 OKE, LO MAU UI 100% NATIVE!

Masalah: sekarang Home/Search tetep buka WebView (tampil kayak browser). Lo mau:

```
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  📱 UI NATIVE = GAK ADA WEB SAMA SEKALI!                 ║
╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║                                                          ║
║  Search → API/search results in native list             ║
║  Video card → thumbnail + title + channel (native)      ║
║  Play → ExoPlayer/VideoView (native player)             ║
║  Download → yt-dlp background                           ║
║  Library → native list                                  ║
║                                                          ║
║  BUTUH: yt-dlp buat search + extract video URL          ║
║  Gak butuh YouTube API Key!                             ║
║                                                          ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

Gue test dulu yt-dlp bisa search + ambil thumbnail gak:

function.name: bash_exec
function.arguments:
{"command": "# Test yt-dlp search + metadata
python3 << 'EOF'
import yt_dlp

# Search YouTube
ydl_opts = {
    'quiet': True,
    'extract_flat': True,
    'default_search': 'ytsearch5',
}

with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL(ydl_opts) as ydl:
    result = ydl.extract_info("search:dota 2 gameplay", download=False)
    
    print(f"Total results: {len(result['entries'])}")
    print("---")
    for i, entry in enumerate(result['entries'][:5]):
        print(f"[{i+1}] {entry.get('title','?')}")
        print(f"    URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v={entry.get('id','?')}")
        print(f"    Channel: {entry.get('channel','?')}")
        print(f"    Duration: {entry.get('duration','?')}s")
        print(f"    Thumbnail: {entry.get('thumbnails',[{}])[0].get('url','?') if entry.get('thumbnails') else entry.get('thumbnail','?')}")
        print()
EOF", "timeout": 30}

function.name: bash_exec
function.arguments:
{"command": "# Test backend
python3 yt_backend.py &
sleep 3

# Test search
echo "=== SEARCH ==="
curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8765/search?q=dota+2" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Results: {len(d.get(\"results\",[]))}'); [print(f'  [{i+1}] {v[\"title\"][:50]} | {v[\"duration_str\"]}') for i,v in enumerate(d.get('results',[])[:5])]"

echo ""
echo "=== STATUS ==="
curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8765/status"

echo ""
echo "=== LOCAL MUSIC ==="
curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8765/local?folder=music" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Files: {len(d.get(\"files\",[]))}'); [print(f'  {f[\"name\"][:50]} ({f[\"size_mb\"]}MB)') for f in d.get('files',[])[:5]]"

# Kill server
kill %1 2>/dev/null", "timeout": 30}

function.name: bash_exec
function.arguments:
{"command": "pkill -f yt_backend 2>/dev/null; sleep 1

# Run backend in background with output to file
nohup python3 yt_backend.py > /tmp/yt_backend.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3

# Test status
curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8765/status" 2>/dev/null && echo "" || echo "Server not responding"

echo "---"

# Test search with timeout
curl -s --max-time 15 "http://127.0.0.1:8765/search?q=lofi" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin)
    results = d.get('results',[])
    print(f'Results: {len(results)}')
    for i,v in enumerate(results[:3]):
        print(f'  [{i+1}] {v[\"title\"][:50]} | {v[\"duration_str\"]}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Parse error: {e}')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Search timeout"", "timeout": 25}

function.name: bash_exec
function.arguments:
{"command": "python3 -c "
from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
import json

class H(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def log_message(self, *a): pass
    def do_GET(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type','application/json')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps({'status':'ok'}).encode())

s = HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1',8765), H)
import threading
t = threading.Thread(target=s.serve_forever, daemon=True)
t.start()

import urllib.request
r = urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/', timeout=3)
print('Status:', r.read().decode())
s.shutdown()
"", "timeout": 10}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background_dark">

    <!-- Search Bar -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="8dp"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="24dp"
            android:layout_height="24dp"
            android:layout_margin="12dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/searchInput"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:hint="Search YouTube"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint"
            android:background="@drawable/input_background"
            android:padding="10dp"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:singleLine="true"
            android:imeOptions="actionSearch"
            android:inputType="textUri" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/voiceBtn"
            android:layout_width="40dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_btn_speak_now"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary"
            android:visibility="gone" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- Chip Categories -->
    <HorizontalScrollView
        android:id="@+id/chipScroll"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/chipContainer"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:padding="8dp"
            android:orientation="horizontal" />
    </HorizontalScrollView>

    <!-- Content Area (WebView + Video List) -->
    <FrameLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1">

        <!-- Video List View -->
        <ListView
            android:id="@+id/videoList"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:divider="@color/divider"
            android:dividerHeight="1dp"
            android:background="@color/background_dark"
            android:visibility="visible" />

        <!-- WebView for actual YouTube playback -->
        <WebView
            android:id="@+id/webView"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:visibility="gone" />

        <!-- Fullscreen Container -->
        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/fullscreenContainer"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:background="#000000" />
    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- Mini Player (shown when video playing in background) -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/miniPlayer"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:background="@color/surface_light"
        android:visibility="gone"
        android:padding="4dp">

        <View
            android:layout_width="48dp"
            android:layout_height="48dp"
            android:background="@color/red_accent" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="8dp">
            <TextView

        </LinearLayout>

        <ImageButton

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="📁"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Library"
                android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/navDownloads"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true">
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="⬇️"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Downloads"
                android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

{"content": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background_dark">

    <!-- Search Bar -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="8dp"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="24dp"
            android:layout_height="24dp"
            android:layout_margin="12dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/searchInput"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:hint="Search YouTube"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint"
            android:background="@drawable/input_background"
            android:padding="10dp"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:singleLine="true"
            android:imeOptions="actionSearch"
            android:inputType="text" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/searchBtn"
            android:layout_width="40dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- Chip Categories -->
    <HorizontalScrollView
        android:id="@+id/chipScroll"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/chipContainer"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:padding="8dp"
            android:orientation="horizontal" />
    </HorizontalScrollView>

    <!-- Progress bar -->
    <ProgressBar
        android:id="@+id/progressBar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="4dp"
        android:indeterminate="true"
        android:visibility="gone"
        style="@android:style/Widget.Material.ProgressBar.Horizontal"
        android:tint="@color/red_accent" />

    <!-- Content Area -->
    <FrameLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1">

        <!-- Video List -->
        <ListView
            android:id="@+id/videoList"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:divider="@color/divider"
            android:dividerHeight="1dp"
            android:background="@color/background_dark" />

        <!-- Native Video Player (hidden by default) -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/playerContainer"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:background="#000000">

            <VideoView
                android:id="@+id/videoView"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="0dp"
                android:layout_weight="1" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="horizontal"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:background="@color/surface"
                android:padding="8dp">

                <ImageButton
                    android:id="@+id/playerBack"
                    android:layout_width="40dp"
                    android:layout_height="40dp"
                    android:src="@android:drawable/ic_media_previous"
                    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                    android:tint="@color/text_primary" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/playerTitle"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                    android:textSize="13sp"
                    android:singleLine="true"
                    android:padding="8dp"
                    android:text="Now Playing" />

                <ImageButton
                    android:id="@+id/playerClose"
                    android:layout_width="40dp"
                    android:layout_height="40dp"
                    android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel"
                    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                    android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- Empty state -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/emptyText"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_gravity="center"
            android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:text="Search for videos..."
            android:visibility="gone" />
    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- Bottom Navigation -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:background="@color/surface"
        android:elevation="8dp">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/navHome"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true">
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🏠"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/navHomeLabel"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Home"
                android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/navSearch"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true">
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔍"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/navSearchLabel"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Search"
                android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/navLibrary"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true">
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="📁"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/navLibraryLabel"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Library"
                android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/navDownloads"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true">
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="⬇️"
                android:textSize="20sp" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/navDownloadsLabel"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Downloads"
                android:textColor="@color/text_hint"
                android:textSize="10sp" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>
", "path": "app/src/main/res/layout/activity_youtube.xml"}

function.name: write_file
function.arguments:
{"content": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:orientation="horizontal"
    android:padding="8dp"
    android:background="@color/background_dark">

    <!-- Thumbnail -->
    <RelativeLayout
        android:layout_width="160dp"
        android:layout_height="90dp">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/thumb"
            android:layout_width="160dp"
            android:layout_height="90dp"
            android:scaleType="centerCrop"
            android:background="@color/surface_light" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/duration"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_alignParentBottom="true"
            android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
            android:layout_margin="4dp"
            android:background="#CC000000"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="11sp"
            android:padding="2dp"
            android:text="--:--" />
    </RelativeLayout>

    <!-- Info -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="90dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:paddingStart="8dp"
        android:paddingEnd="4dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/title"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:maxLines="2"
            android:ellipsize="end"
            android:text="Title" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/channel"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"
            android:textSize="11sp"
            android:singleLine="true"
            android:ellipsize="end"
            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
            android:text="Channel" />
    </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
", "path": "app/src/main/res/layout/video_item.xml"}

STDERR:

Build belum bisa dites karena Java Activity belum di-rewrite. Layout native + video_item.xml udah siap. Masih perlu:

1. **Rewrite `YouTubeActivity.java`** — hapus semua WebView, ganti dengan:
   - HTTP call ke `http://127.0.0.1:8765/search?q=...` → parse JSON → tampilkan di ListView
   - Thumbnail load pakai `BitmapFactory` dari URL (background thread)
   - Click video → call `/video?id=...` → dapat `stream_url` → play di `VideoView`
   - Download → POST `/download`
   - Library/Downloads → call `/downloads` dan `/local`

2. **Backend (`yt_backend.py`)** — udah jadi, perlu start di Termux

Mau gue lanjut tulis `YouTubeActivity.java` yang 100% native sekarang? Atau lo cuma mau ngetest build dulu?
